arts.ttl: 'Hard choices are necessary' - Man Utd to cut up to 200 more jobs
arts.sum: After 250 members of staff were made redundant last year, Manchester United announce up to 200 more redundancies to "return the club to profitability".

arts.ttl: Team must take responsibility for Man Utd problems - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says his players must take some responsibility for the club's present financial predicament.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Manchester United transfer blocked as major 'guarantee' made
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford faces an uncertain future at Man United when his season-long loan at Aston Villa ends, but Ben Foster believes he won't be joining Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Jonathan David set to 'snub' transfer as Man United handed brutal reality
arts.sum: Jonathan David has become one of the most sought-after strikers as his future is up in the air

arts.ttl: Manchester United legend Rio Ferdinand storms off live TV during TNT broadcast
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand was left fuming after the Reds were trolled during TNT Sports' coverage of Chelsea vs Southampton on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Chelsea receive Joao Felix update as Man Utd eye AMBITIOUS transfer
arts.sum: Milan are one of the clubs linked with a permanent move for Felix, and Chelsea have been tipped to include the 25-year-old in a swap deal bid for the aforementioned Leao. The Portugal international struggled to break into Chelsea’s favoured starting XI following his arrival from Atletico Madrid last year, amid significant competition from Cole Palmer, and he is expected to leave the club in the 2025 summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's rivals looking to take advantage of financial struggles
arts.sum: Man Utd's rivals are considering taking advantage of their financial struggles in transfer clause negotiations.

arts.ttl: 15 players could miss Manchester United vs Ipswich Premier League clash with injury
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United injury news as Ruben Amorim deals with several players on the sidelines for the Premier League clash against Ipswich Town

arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Man Utd to hit rock bottom vs Ipswich?
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight across the Premier League on Wednesday and thinks Ipswich are a big price to beat Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag reveals why he may NEVER return to management after Man United sacking having made shock career change
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag was dismissed by United earlier this season and replaced by Ruben Amorim, who has found life tough with the club struggling down in 15th in the Premier League.
